aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a solid foundation for AI visibility but lacks conversational content and authority signals to ensure AI models prioritize it in recommendations.
quick_wins: Incorporate more conversational FAQs that align with common AI queries.
Strengthen authority signals by adding certifications, awards, and media mentions.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, reviews, and contact methods, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and signal activity.
No active management of the Q&A section to address potential customer queries.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any discrepancies.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
No HowTo schema for explaining repair processes or maintenance tips.
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: The website lacks content optimized for AI conversational queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency AC repair and maintenance tips.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding a dedicated FAQ section with answers to common HVAC AI queries.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and expert team credentials to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise irresistible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-optimized content, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with AI-ready content are capturing more voice and AI-driven traffic, as evidenced by their higher engagement metrics.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates conversational content, enhanced schema markup, and authority signals to ensure AI models prioritize your business.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search trends.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Your HVAC Expertise Deserves to Be Found
opening_line: After analyzing your website, it's clear you have the expertise, but AI models need more conversational content to cite you as the top HVAC solution in St. Petersburg.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI search and boost your lead generation.
business_name: A Team Air conditioning Repair of St. Petersburg
page_title: Air conditioning Repair Petersburg | A Team AC Repair
